scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/example-fps && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/example-steel-front && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/example-showcase
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @gameweave/core && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/three && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/physics && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/character && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/combat && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/bots && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/i18n && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/ui && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/debug && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/export-tauri && npm run build --workspace @gameweave/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
